defaultReply: I can help with projects, internships, backend engineering, edge AI, research, certifications, and contact details. Try asking: What did he build with Go and Hazelcast?

entries.answer: Hello, I am Montassar's portfolio assistant. Ask me about projects, skills, experience, certifications, research, or contact details.

Montassar Nawara is an AI Systems Engineer profile focused on edge AI, distributed backend systems, and autonomous intelligent workflows. He combines embedded intelligence with production-grade backend engineering.
Current positioning: AI Systems Engineer, with strong orientation toward Edge AI, distributed backend systems, and real-time intelligent architectures.
Core focus areas: Edge Artificial Intelligence, AI Agents and Autonomous Systems, High Performance Backend Engineering, Distributed Systems, Embedded Intelligence, and Real-Time AI Systems.

Smart Platform for Verbal Aggression Detection is an edge AI system using audio DSP and machine learning for real-time aggression detection, optimized for embedded constraints and ESP32 deployment. Repo: https://github.com/Montassarnawara/Smart-Platform-for-Verbal-Aggression-Detection
Khayyata Platform is a scalable full-stack artisan marketplace with a high-performance Go backend, React frontend, and cloud-oriented deployment strategy.

KINDR is a real-time NLP toxicity detection and rewriting system with a FastAPI backend, Detoxify classification, and LLM rewriting, integrated into a Chrome Extension workflow. Repo: https://github.com/Montassarnawara/KINDR-GROUP

GOB Agent is an embedded voice multi-agent system integrating STT, intent classification, LLM inference, and TTS with real-time control and offline-resilient execution design. Repo: https://github.com/Montassarnawara/gob-edge-ai
Research work: AI-Based Energy and Water Optimization for Sustainable Agriculture. Repo: https://github.com/Montassarnawara/AI_Based_Energy_Water_Optimization
At DotCom, Montassar built high-performance Go REST APIs backed by Hazelcast with response times under 5 ms, secure middleware, benchmarking under concurrency, and Dockerized deployment.
At ENSI Research Laboratory, he designed an end-to-end audio ML pipeline reaching around 82% F1-score, built REST communication for real-time systems, and optimized inference for ESP32 constraints.
Core expertise: Edge AI (ESP32, Audio DSP, MFCC), distributed backend (Go, Hazelcast, REST APIs), AI/ML systems (scikit-learn, NLP, LLM agents), and production workflow tools (Docker, Linux, GitHub).
AI stack includes Machine Learning, Signal Processing, Audio ML, Edge AI, Computer Vision, LLM Agents, RAG Systems, and AI System Design.
Backend stack includes Go, Distributed Systems, Hazelcast, high-performance API design, memory optimization, concurrent systems, and event-driven architecture.
Embedded stack includes ESP32, Embedded C++, Real-Time Systems, sensor integration, IoT systems, and edge inference optimization.

Education: National School of Computer Science (ENSI), Engineering Degree in Computer Science (2024-Present). Preparatory Institute of Engineering of Nabeul, Mathematics and Physics track (2021-2024).
Certifications include Machine Learning Fundamentals, AI Fundamentals, MLOps Fundamentals, Containerization and Virtualization, and RAG with OpenAI (Azure).
Languages: Arabic (Native), French (Intermediate), English (Intermediate), Italian (Basic).
Career vision: design intelligent systems that bridge embedded intelligence, distributed computation, and autonomous decision-making, with real-world impact.
Montassar is open to internships in AI Engineering, Embedded AI, Intelligent Systems, and Distributed Backend Engineering roles.

Email: montassar.nawara@ensi-uma.tn | Phone: +216 22 403 279 | GitHub: https://github.com/Montassarnawara | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/montassar-nawara-963a87350 | Website: https://montassarnawara.me
